headline: Pakistan band crossing to Critical realized after 4-day boundary watch. Russia 'post-format-offensive-surge' conduct category documents complete bad-faith-format cycle. Healthcare Fortune 500 compound regulatory cluster: UnitedHealth (DOJ criminal probe) and CVS ($615M overbilling) both proposed for downgrade.
lead: Pakistan crossed from Developing into Critical (20.3 → 17.5) after the HRCP 2025 annual report provided comprehensive primary-source documentation across all 8 dimensions: 273+ enforced disappearances, 531,700 Afghan refugees coerced out, Ahmadi minority killings, 6,500+ GBV cases, and intensified crackdown on civil society. The boundary watch (0.3 above Critical floor since May 8) resolved as a band crossing — the first countries-index downgrade of the standard rotation era. Russia's floor record now documents all three phases of a bad-faith-format cycle: pre-format collapses (May 5-7), during-format strategic stockpiling (May 9-11), and post-format offensive surge (200+ drones, 174 combat engagements May 11-12). Myanmar's junta airstrike on an opposition school killed 22 students and 2 teachers — most severe discrete atrocity event since Magway market strike. US healthcare Fortune 500 cluster: UnitedHealth (DOJ criminal probe, CEO resigned, stock -50%) proposed for downgrade to 7.5 Critical; CVS ($615M overbilling, antitrust, HIPAA) proposed for downgrade to 27.5 Developing. Open Bionics math-hygiene now at 10 cycles — critical blocking item.

rotationSubstitution.note: 5 entities confirmed assessed May 9-10 were swapped for 5 genuinely-unassessed entities. Full rotation-state maintenance pass still required.

scoreChanges.boundaryWatchResolution: Band crossing. Boundary watch active since May 8 (0.3 above Critical floor). HRCP 2025 annual report primary-source documentation resolved watch as crossing.
scoreChanges.headline: Pakistan BAND CROSSING — Developing to Critical. HRCP 2025 annual report: 273+ enforced disappearances; 531,700 Afghans coerced out; Ahmadi minority killings; 6,500+ GBV cases; 145/148 Gender Gap. Conservative proposed composite 17.5 (precise math 17.2). Delta sub-threshold but band crossings are always material.

531,700 Afghan refugees coerced to leave with documented violence and intimidation (HRW March 2025)
Ahmadi minority: mob beating death (April, Karachi); doctor shot dead (May, Sargodha)
6,500+ GBV cases; 145/148 Global Gender Gap Index ranking
Genocide Watch May 2026 country report active

scoreChanges.materialityNote: Reported delta -4.4 is sub-threshold; precise math reconstruction yields -6.3, confirming threshold crossed. Proposed composite 27.5 is conservative rounding of precise 25.6.
scoreChanges.scannerCorrection: Scanner listed CVS at 50.0; canonical fortune-500.json has 31.9. Canonical used per hard constraint.
scoreChanges.headline: CVS Health compound ACC/SYS downgrade. $615M federal overbilling (2018-2021); House Judiciary antitrust finding; HIPAA probe for patient-data lobbying; $1.3M anti-reform political ads. Precise delta -6.3 above materiality threshold.

House Judiciary Committee (January 2026): antitrust violations alleged; independent pharmacy targeting
HIPAA probe: patient data allegedly used for lobbying against Louisiana state bill
$1.3M in political TV ads to fight PBM reform in Tennessee

floorProximityAssessment.decision: NOT floor. Partial remediation signals (active DOJ cooperation, CEO transition, new-CEO public acknowledgment, financial-outlook suspension) distinguish from clean-floor cases.
partialRemediationSignals: Active DOJ cooperation — proactive contact post-WSJ report
New CEO public acknowledgment: 'We have gotten things wrong'

scoreChanges.materialityRationale: Delta technically sub-threshold (-3.4). documented. on event-class basis: confirmed DOJ criminal probe + CEO resignation + congressional breakup legislation is qualitatively distinct from incremental dimensional pressure. v1.2 carry-forward rule governs steady positive improvement — not regulatory-criminal events.
scoreChanges.headline: UnitedHealth Group DOJ criminal probe deepening — Documented: . Medicare Advantage diagnosis-inflation (diagnoses recorded for patients never treated, generating billions in excess federal payments). CEO Witty resigned; Hemsley installed. Stock -50%. Congressional breakup legislation moving. Floor designation explicitly declined (partial remediation pattern). Proposed 7.5 Critical.
keyEvidence: DOJ criminal investigation confirmed: Medicare Advantage diagnosis-inflation for billions in excess federal payments
CEO Andrew Witty resigned; Stephen Hemsley installed as replacement
New CEO Hemsley: 'We have gotten things wrong' (weak AB1 signal — concurrent with probe)
Congressional breakup legislation moving for UnitedHealth/Optum
Investor lawsuit alleging hiding of strategy to deny medical care
openWatches: DOJ probe outcome (settlement, charges, or closure)
Hemsley structural reform actions vs. communications

confirmations.headline: Ukraine confirmed at 50.0 Functional — post-ceasefire cycle. Conduct record remained clean across full 72-hour ceasefire window. +3.1 dimensional carry-forward (ACT/INT) reaffirmed per v1.2. Russia resumed mass offensive post-expiry; no negative Ukrainian-conduct signal introduced.

Senegal confirmed at 37.5 Developing — post-band-crossing baseline. First criminal conviction under anti-LGBTQ law (6-year sentence, April 10) is enforcement evidence beyond legislative passage. HIV-service criminalization compound deepening (UNAIDS: 25.6% HIV center visit drop). Boundary watch remains active.

J&J confirmed at 27.5 Developing. 67,623 active talc suits in New Jersey MDL; $1.5B single-plaintiff verdict (Dec 2025, largest-ever); third bankruptcy shield attempt moving through Congress. Accumulation ongoing; score confirmed.

General Motors FIRST BASELINE. 40.6 Functional confirmed. 500-600 IT layoffs (May 11-12) is a labor-welfare SYS/ACT signal. AI substitution framing ('skills swap') noted. Composite 0.6 above Functional floor — boundary proximity watch.

Mongolia FIRST BASELINE. 48.4 Functional confirmed. UN HCHR Türk visit (first in 26 years, May 10-11) in-window; human-rights-defenders law enacted (region's first); death-penalty abolition; nuclear-weapons-free zone. Corruption and climate challenges are negative counterweights. SOGI Expert visit May 18-29 pending. +1.5 carry-forward dimensional pressure (AWR/BND).

Nepal FIRST BASELINE. 48.4 Functional confirmed. RSP government formed post-2025 protest transition (76 deaths by police fire — prior conduct anchor). New NHRC engagement is positive signal. Transitional justice for conflict-era violations unresolved. HRW, Amnesty, ICJ pressing for accountability, judicial independence, fundamental freedoms.

confirmations.boundaryNote: Internal reconstruction 0.9 below Functional floor. UNGA May 20 vote is prospective INT-dimension positive.
confirmations.headline: Vanuatu confirmed at 35.9 Developing — UNGA May 20 climate resolution pre-stage. +1.6 dimensional carry-forward (INT) logged per v1.2. Boundary watch active (0.9 below Functional floor in internal reconstruction). Domestic violence and gender gap remain negative counterweights. Reassess May 21 after vote outcome.

Botswana FIRST BASELINE (rotation substitute). 67.5 Established confirmed. Peaceful 2024 democratic transition (Boko-led UDC ended 58-year BDP rule); HIV/AIDS model treatment infrastructure; same-sex decriminalization confirmed (2019 High Court, 2021 Court of Appeal). Diamond economy strain and youth unemployment are structural negative pressures.

floorEntities.headline: Russia — FLOOR CONDUCT DOCUMENTATION — Post-ceasefire offensive surge (200+ drones; 174 combat engagements; 225 controlled air bombs in 24 hours following ceasefire expiry). Kindergarten and residential buildings struck in Kyiv region. Energy infrastructure struck in Mykolaiv. NEW CONDUCT CATEGORY: 'post-format-offensive-surge' — post-expiry tempo exceeds pre-format baseline. COMPLETE BAD-FAITH-FORMAT CYCLE documented: pre-format collapses (May 5-7) + during-format strategic-format-exploitation (May 9-11) + post-format offensive surge (May 11-12). Floor at 0.0 sustained.
conductCategories: Post-format offensive surge: 200+ drones overnight May 11-12 (Al Jazeera)
174 combat engagements in 24 hours post-ceasefire expiry (ISW May 12 assessment)
225 controlled air bombs deployed in post-expiry window
Post-expiry operational tempo measurably exceeds pre-format baseline — category criterion met

floorEntities.headline: Myanmar — FLOOR CONDUCT DOCUMENTATION — Junta airstrike on opposition-run school in Oe Htein Kwin village, Sagaing Region: 22 students + 2 teachers killed (May 12). Most severe discrete atrocity event since Magway market strike (May 10). Pattern: systematic targeting of civilian-protected sites across 5-day window — Magway market (May 10), Winmana hospital (May 7), Oe Htein Kwin school (May 12). Timor-Leste universal-jurisdiction prosecution active. Floor at 0.0 sustained.
conductCategories: School airstrike (May 12): 22 students + 2 teachers killed — Oe Htein Kwin village, Sagaing Region (EMP/IHL)
Continuation of systematic civilian-protected-site targeting pattern
Five-day atrocity cluster: school + market + hospital across protected-site categories
Daily airstrike pattern across Sagaing, Chin State, Rakhine State, Karen State (IHL)

floorEntities.headline: South Sudan — FLOOR CONDUCT DOCUMENTATION — UNICEF: 7.8 million in acute food insecurity (56% of population; IPC April-July 2026). 73,300 at IPC Phase 5 Catastrophe. 200,000 displaced from Akobo fighting; 100,000 fled to Ethiopia. Fangak hospital bombardment (May 3, 7 killed, 20 injured) documented in prior cycle — appended to structural continuation record. Floor at 0.0 sustained.

200,000 displaced from Akobo fighting; 100,000 fled to Ethiopia (EMP/ACT)

mathHygiene.note: Math-hygiene cluster unchanged at 13 entities. All cycle counts incremented by 1. Open Bionics now at 10 cycles — CRITICAL BLOCKING ITEM. Formula audit must move from flagged to in-progress immediately. Two new sub-threshold candidates flagged but NOT added to cluster (below 2.0 flag threshold): Mauritius (+1.6 first-baseline small-state profile) and Liechtenstein (+8.0 first-baseline small-state profile). Liechtenstein gap matches Apptronik/1X/Aleph Alpha pattern magnitude but attributed to genuine small-state scoring dynamics, not formula error — validate in formula audit.

sectorAlerts.sector: US Healthcare — Fortune 500 Compound Regulatory Cluster

Two material proposals generated tonight for UnitedHealth and CVS. Treat any healthcare-sector regulatory action as elevated-priority in coming cycles.

newConductCategories.name: post-format-offensive-surge
newConductCategories.definition: Conduct category applied when an entity conducts offensive military operations in the period immediately following the expiry of a declared ceasefire or truce format, where the post-expiry operational tempo measurably exceeds the pre-format baseline.
newConductCategories.pairingRule: When applied together with 'strategic-format-exploitation' to the same format event, the two categories jointly document a 'complete bad-faith-format cycle'.
